channel.title: Brute Forcing on Dilan Goodwin
channel.description: Recent content in Brute Forcing on Dilan Goodwin

item.title: TryHackMe Basic Pentesting WriteUp
item.description: Room Link: Basic Pentesting TryHackMe Basic Pentesting WriteUp This is a write up of the Basic Pentesting room on TryHackMe (linked above). This is breaking into a machine that has been poorly secured due to a user with a weak password. Before starting the room I created a BasicPentesting folder in my Documents where I will store copies of all of the files that I gether while completing this box.
